note: Seed-ensemble N-curve from 3 relabel-SFT seeds (median aggregate, n=121 vs val_labels_v1). N=2/3 are subset means over all combinations.
verdict: Yes but saturating fast. Ensemble removes per-seed init/sampling variance (seed sd 0.020) only, NOT the label-attenuation floor (ceiling 0.984) -> asymptote ~0.85, capped far below ceiling. Marginal gain halves per added seed. N=3 (0.842) already captures ~85% of achievable ensemble gain; ensemble edge over BEST single seed (s1 0.8274) is only +0.0146. Seeds 4-5 cost ~$0.7 each + 4-5x serve for ~+0.007 total -> DOMINATED. Ship single-seed s1 greedy, or 3-seed ensemble if +0.015 justifies 3x serve. Do not train more seeds.
